title: Product Packaging Designer — Sealants Brand Launch (Logo Provided, Full Print-Ready Package Needed)
brief: Hello, We're a Dubai-based B2B trading business launching our first private-label sealants brand, OBCO SealPro, in January 2027. The master logo has been designed and approved. We now need an experienced packaging designer to extend it into a complete print-production-ready package for three SKUs. This is a fixed-scope project with clear deliverables, an 8-week timeline, and a $2,000 budget (open to negotiation based on portfolio quality and proposed approach). WHAT WE NEED — 5 DELIVERABLES 1. MASTER LOGO SYSTEM & BRAND GUIDELINES Extend the supplied master logo into color variants, mono versions, reversed versions, and a horizontal lockup. Plus a 5–8 page PDF brand standards document covering logo usage, color codes (Pantone/CMYK/RGB/Hex), typography, and usage rules. 2. CARTRIDGE LABEL/SLEEVE ARTWORK — 2 SKUs Design wrap-around labels for two 600ml SKUs: MS Polymer Sealant (grey) and PU Construction Sealant (grey). Built as a swappable-element template so SKU codes are easily changed. 3. TUBE LABEL ARTWORK — 1 SKU Design label for 300ml Neutral Silicone Sealant (white). Same design system as the cartridges, adapted for the tube format. 4. CARTON DESIGN — ALL 3 SKUs Outer carton artwork for 20-cartridge and 24-tube cartons. Single-color black-on-cardboard for cost efficiency at scale. 5. DIGITAL ASSETS PACKAGE Templates for Amazon UAE listings, social media tiles (1080x1080), web banner (1920x1080), email signature (350x120), WhatsApp catalog product cards. Print-ready files
